title: Python for AI, PE, VC and RAG
scope: Wk11: Python I. Wk12: Python II + LLM API. Wk13: Prompt Engineering + Version Control. Wk14: RAG, Vectors, Agents — concept + demo, no build.
source_label: M5 – Python for AI, PE, VC and RAG

assessments.title: Python and Prompt Engineering Portfolio
assessments.requirement: Portfolio of lab notebooks (Weeks 11–13). Each must include: the original plain-English spec, independently written working code, edge-case tests (minimum 3 per notebook), and a reflection. Week 13: prompt engineering portfolio with 3 iteration versions, accuracy comparison table, output validator that retries on format failure, and GitHub repo with README and 3 meaningful commits. Graded on: spec quality, code correctness, edge-case coverage, error handling, VC discipline.
